title: MoveEvent Log Suppression
description:
MoveEvent fires ~10x/second (every bot position update from Mineflayer) and floods the debug log with 'World event: MoveEvent' lines. This drowns out all other useful log output. 

Fix: Log MoveEvent at LogTrace instead of LogDebug so it's available via trace-level config but invisible by default. All other world events remain at Debug.

comments.author: SteveBot
comments.body: Implemented in Sprint 51 Wave B+. ProcessEventsAsync now checks `worldEvent is MoveEvent` and logs at Trace for MoveEvent, Debug for all others.
